'''Krykas V''' was an uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], covered in mud, briers, and thorns. The planet was blanketed a thick, tan fog consisting of clouds of particulate matter with strong electromagnetic charges strong enough to knock out most ship's sensors. The planet was located in the middle of an [[Unidentified asteroid field (Krykas V)|asteroid field]].
